name: Frida Circle Pool Deck Plan - 16x16 Pool Deck for 15' Round Pools | DIY PDF Plans
open_features: Designed specifically for 15' diameter round above-ground pools
Efficient 16x16 wrap-around deck with room for seating and relaxation
Optimized deck width for safe walking and comfortable pool access
Built-in railing layout for enhanced safety and clean aesthetics
Compact footprint - perfect for tight spaces and small backyard layouts
Easy-to-follow DIY PDF plans with complete material cut list & step-by-step building guide
Pool Fit: 15' diameter round above-ground pools (pool not included)
description_summary:
The Frida Circle Pool Deck Plan turns your 15-foot above-ground pool into a stylish and space-efficient backyard escape. Featuring a 16x16 compact wrap-around deck layout, this design delivers safe access, functional flow, and cozy lounge space - making it ideal for smaller yards, urban backyards, and budget-conscious builds. Frida blends smart design, safety, and modern outdoor style into one beautifully balanced pool deck solution. Key Features
